# Development Plans

> 智能体启动任务前先阅读本文件，确认当前活跃计划与优先级。

## 当前状态

- **活跃计划目录**: `docs/exec-plans/active/`
- **Harness 状态**: 通过 `scripts/check_harness.py` 持续维护
- **结构性技术债**: `docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md`

## 活跃计划入口

- [Harness Bootstrap](docs/exec-plans/active/2026-04-05-harness-bootstrap.md)
- [Provider Health View](docs/exec-plans/active/2026-04-05-provider-health-view.md)

## 规则

1. 新任务需要创建或复用 `docs/exec-plans/active/` 中的活跃计划
2. 完成后归档到 `docs/exec-plans/completed/`
3. 结构性技术债与延后治理写入 `docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md`
4. `PLANS.md` 保持短小，只做高层入口，不复制执行细节

> ✅ Completed: 2026-04-06
> Summary: Delivered provider health planning loop
> Duration: 1 day
> Key learnings: Keep plan lifecycle script-driven

# Provider Health View

## 元信息

- **状态**: 🟡 Active
- **负责人**: Codex / Claude Agent
- **创建日期**: 2026-04-05
- **目标**: Expose a provider health view in settings
- **范围**: Settings UI, health command, relevant docs
- **非目标**: Historical analytics and background polling
- **回滚方案**: Git revert 或恢复本次修改文件
- **关联入口**: `docs/PLANS.md`
- **计划路径**: `docs/exec-plans/active/2026-04-05-provider-health-view.md`

## Harness 预检

- **仓库自检状态**: 可用且通过
- **Harness 关键观测面**:
  - scripts/check_harness.py
  - docs/generated/harness-manifest.md
  - docs/OBSERVABILITY.md
  - docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md

## 背景

Users cannot verify provider readiness before a request fails

## 优化后的任务定义

- **Outcome**: Expose a provider health view in settings
- **Problem**: Users cannot verify provider readiness before a request fails
- **Scope**: Settings UI, health command, relevant docs
- **Non-goals**: Historical analytics and background polling
- **Constraints**:
  - Respect existing Tauri command boundaries
- **Affected surfaces**:
  - apps/web
- **Validation**:
  - Manual settings verification and targeted tests
- **Docs to sync**:
  - docs/exec-plans/active/2026-04-05-provider-health-view.md
  - docs/PLANS.md
  - docs/OBSERVABILITY.md
- **Open assumptions**:
  - Existing provider config path remains the source of truth

## 渐进执行切片

### Slice 1 — 建立上下文与最小可行变更

- [ ] 实现
- [ ] 验证

### Slice 2 — 完成核心实现

- [ ] 实现
- [ ] 验证

### Slice 3 — 文档、可观测性与收尾

- [ ] 同步文档与生成事实
- [ ] 最终验证

## 风险与回滚

  - UI may misrepresent transient provider failures if health semantics are weak
- Git revert 或恢复本次修改文件

## 决策记录

| 日期 | 决策 | 原因 |
| ---- | ---- | ---- |

## 验证记录

- 初始化计划，待补充实际验证命令与结果

## 完成归档说明

- 在归档前补充完成日期、摘要、周期和关键经验
